{{Quote|And if you and Grigor happen to blow each other away in the process… then good riddance to both of you!|Merrik|<ref name="roc4">[[River of Chaos 4|''River of Chaos'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Merrik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he fought alongside [[Jalose]] and other resistance fighters against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation, lead by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]] on the planet [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]]. He followed orders from [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who had taken a personal interest in the uprising on the planet.

[[File:MerrikDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Merrik dies in the explosion of the Dragite mine.]]

Although he had feelings for [[Jalose]], Merrik appeared to be attracted to [[Mora]], a new recruit to the rebellion on M'haeli. After Governor Grigor captured Mora and revealed her to be a direct descendant of the planets royal family, he was amongst the first to volunteer for the rescue party being put together by former Imperial officer [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]]

He mistrusted Ranulf to the end, but in a mission to destroy an Imperial controlled [[Dragite crystal]] mine, he sacrificed himself to allow both Trommer and Mora to escape.
